default_body.markdown:
## Notes:
- Since version 26.2+, Mojang has introduced the Vulkan rendering engine. If your device does **not** support **Vulkan 1.2**, please do **not** use the **Vulkan backend** to launch the latest version of Minecraft.

## Refactors:
- [GP#1367](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1367): Rewrote control layout interaction logic (by @MovTery)

## Changes:
- [GP#1358](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1358): Search ID input field now supports pressing Enter to search (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1359](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1359): Updated project dependencies (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1369](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1369): Theme: Use Scheme's built-in Surface color attributes (by @MovTery)

## Fixes:
- [GP#1357](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1357): Physical mouse movement position and stylus event handling (by @MovTery)
- [Main#8c4f2c6](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/commit/8c4f2c6): Game manifest merge logic should use the original assetsIndex (by @MovTery)
- [Main#8c4f2c6](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/commit/8c4f2c6): Clean game files should ignore non-existent version JSONs (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1366](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1366): Pass current account data via Intent during launch process (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1368](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1368): Attempting to render blur effect when no background is set (by @MovTery)

bodies.markdown:
## 提示：
- 26.2+ Mojang 引入了 Vulkan 渲染引擎，若您的设备不支持 **Vulkan 1.2**，请勿使用 **Vulkan 后端**启动 Minecraft 最新版本


## 重构：
- [GP#1367](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1367)：重写控制布局交互逻辑 (by @MovTery)


## 调整：
- [GP#1358](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1358)：搜索ID 输入框框支持回车搜索 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1359](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1359)：更新项目依赖库 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1369](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1369)：主题：使用Scheme内置的Surface颜色属性 (by @MovTery)


## 修复：
- [GP#1357](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1357)：实体鼠标移动位置、触控笔事件处理 (by @MovTery)
- [Main#8c4f2c6](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/commit/8c4f2c6)：游戏清单合并逻辑应使用原始 assetsIndex (by @MovTery)
- [Main#8c4f2c6](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/commit/8c4f2c6)：清理游戏文件应忽略不存在的版本Json (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1366](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1366)：启动过程中使用Intent传递当前账号数据 (by @MovTery)
- [GP#1368](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1368)：未设置背景时仍试图渲染模糊效果 (by @MovTery)
